parameters.query:
UPDATE public.data
SET output = jsonb_set(
 output,
 '{dialog}', 
 (
 COALESCE(
 (output->'dialog')::jsonb, 
 '[]'::jsonb -- Initialize as empty array if dialog does not exist
 ) || jsonb_build_object(
 'order', (COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(output->'dialog'), 0) + 1), -- Calculate the next order
 'words', '{{ $('Webhook2').item.json.body.data.transcript.words.map(word => word.text.replace(/'/g, "''")).join(" ") }}',
 'speaker', '{{ $('Webhook2').item.json.body.data.transcript.speaker }}',
 'language', '{{ $('Webhook2').item.json.body.data.transcript.language }}',
 'speaker_id', ('{{ $('Webhook2').item.json.body.data.transcript.speaker_id }}')::int,
 'date_updated', to_jsonb('{{ $now }}'::text)
 )
 )
)
WHERE input->>'recall_bot_id' = $1
Returning input->>'openai_thread_id' as thread_id;
